title: Oxymeris asperiuscula
taxonomy: Oxymeris asperiuscula is a species of sea snail, specifically a marine gastropod mollusk in the family Terebridae. It belongs to the family Terebridae, which is a family of small to medium-sized seashells. The classification of Oxymeris asperiuscula is further categorized under the kingdom Animalia, phylum Mollusca, and class Gastropoda. The classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other snail species. Oxymeris asperiuscula is a part of the larger classification system used in malacology.
